chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 6285 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.26279/2026 2. For hearing of main case 26.02.2026 Mr. Faique Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner. M/s Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh along with DSP Liaquat Hayat Khan, Preedy Sub Division, SIP Waseem Mirza, PS Preedy and SIP Nasir, PS Preedy. ------------------------------------ SHO PS Preedy files comments along with copy of FIR No. 817/2025 under Section 489-F PPC registered at PS Preedy and the investigation report, taken on record. Per their comments, the impugned FIR after thorough investigation has been disposed of under “A” Class and such report in terms of Section 173 Cr.P.C. has also been submitted before the Court having jurisdiction. When confronted, counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition. Learned Addl. A.G. Sindh has no objection to the disposal of the case. Since the FIR has been disposed of, the very purpose of the petition has been over. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with the listed application. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
